message: Gere um componente Remotion para este JSON: { "type": "multi-line", "title": "User Acquisition by Channel", "labels": ["W1", "W2", "W3", "W4", "W5", "W6"], "series": [{ "label": "Organic Search", "data": [100, 150, 200, 180, 220, 250] }, { "label": "Social Media", "data": [80, 120, 110, 140, 160, 190] }] }
